params.documentation: IPFS hash or URL to impact report

acceptOwnership().notice: Complete ownership transfer (must be called by pending owner)

dao().notice: DAO control (can be DAO contract or multisig)

deposit(address,uint256,string).notice: Receive VFIDE or stablecoins into Sanctum Can be called by fee routers, donation campaigns, or direct transfers H-4 Fix: Use SafeERC20 for non-standard tokens like USDT

executeDisbursement(uint256).notice: Execute a disbursement once sufficient approvals reached

proposeDisbursement(address,address,uint.notice: Propose a disbursement to an approved charity

requestEmergencyRecovery(address,address.notice: Request emergency token recovery (only if funds are stuck) Requires DAO approval and timelock for transparency
